article.title: Uber | SDE 2 | Bangalore | Reject
article.content:
Current YOE: 4.5


Phone screen: Bus Routes

Onsite:
DSA: Game theory question: We are given an integer array and we have two players Alice and Bob and both are playing a game where they can pick either first or last integer from the array. Each player plays optimally. Return the maximum score Alice can score given she plays first. I believe there is a similar question on Leetcode but with k moves allowed thats solved using prefix sum but I solved this using dp in the interview but messed up the output by computing Math.max instead of Math.min. 

LLD: I had to build a AsyncLibrary which has a bunch of tasks and some of these tasks had dependencies. Had to output the order in which to execute the Library  ( Can be done using Toplogical sort )

HLD: Design stock broker alert system:
User can subscribe for an alert of a particular stock. Say when a stock reaches x% of its original value, they should be notified. Stock exchange keeps giving us the update on the prices for each stock. 

HM : Standard questions 

Recruiter gave the feedback that it was a close call. Asked to reapply after 5-6 months.

post.content: How did you apply ? Is it through referral or directly on job portal?
Could you describe more about the HLD round would be really helpful.
Hi, Can you pls share the DSA Game Theory Question as well? I have a interview coming up in some time.
was this for FE role ? or BE role ?
